ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can choose a color from the color picker or select one from your custom named colors.
ast.target: 你可以从颜色选择器中选择一种颜色，或从自定义命名颜色中选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This PDF document does not have any page labels.
ast.target: 此 PDF 文档没有任何页面标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The index of the first page in this range.
ast.target: 此范围内第一页的索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The index of the last page in this range.
ast.target: 此范围内最后一页的索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the external PDF is located.
ast.target: 外部 PDF 的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type the path in the input box or click the "Browse" button to select the file.
ast.target: 在输入框中输入路径或点击“Browse”按钮选择文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 必须以“https://”或“http://”开头。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If you find PDF++ helpful, please consider supporting the development to help me keep this plugin alive.

If you prefer PayPal, please make donations via Ko-fi. Thank you!
ast.target:
如果你觉得 PDF++ 有帮助，请考虑支持开发，以帮助我继续维护这个插件。

如果你更偏好 PayPal，请通过 Ko-fi 进行捐助。谢谢！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: It must contain at least one character in order to make annotations referenceable & editable within Obsidian.
ast.target: 必须至少包含一个字符，以便在 Obsidian 中可引用并可编辑这些注释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Annotate PDF files with highlights just by linking to text selection. You can easily copy links to selections using color palette in the toolbar. See the "Color palette" section for the details.
ast.target: 只需链接到文本选择即可用高亮注释 PDF 文件。你可以使用工具栏中的调色板轻松复制指向所选内容的链接。详情请参阅“Color palette”部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In the PDF viewer, any referenced text will be highlighted for easy identification.
ast.target: 在 PDF 查看器中，所有被引用的文本都会被高亮显示，便于识别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How backlinks to a text selection should be visualized.
ast.target: 指向文本选择的反向链接应如何可视化显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn this on if you want to open markdown files in a single pane in the sidebar.
ast.target: 如果你想在侧边栏的单个窗格中打开 Markdown 文件，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If some notes are opened in the ignored splits, PDF++ will still open the backlink in the way specified in the previous setting. For example, you might want to ignore the left sidebar if you are pinning a certain note (e.g. daily note) in it.
ast.target: 如果一些笔记打开在被忽略的分屏中，PDF++ 仍会按上一项设置的方式打开反向链接。例如，如果你在左侧边栏中固定了某个笔记（如每日笔记），可能会希望忽略左侧边栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option will be ignored when you open a link in a tab in the same split as the current tab.
ast.target: 当你在与当前标签相同的分屏中以标签页打开链接时，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, all backlinks are highlighted. If this option is enabled, a backlink will be highlighted only when a color is specified in the link text.
ast.target: 默认情况下，所有反向链接都会高亮显示。如果启用此选项，只有在链接文本中指定了颜色时，反向链接才会高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If no color is specified in link text, this color will be used.
ast.target: 如果链接文本中未指定颜色，将使用此颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bounding rectangles will be shown for annotations with backlinks.
ast.target: 带有反向链接的注释将显示边界矩形。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show icons for text selections, annotations, offsets and rectangular selections with backlinks.
ast.target: 为带有反向链接的文本选择、注释、偏移和矩形选择显示图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The higher the value, the better the rendering quality, but the longer time it takes to render. The default value is 100.
ast.target: 数值越高，渲染质量越好，但渲染耗时越长。默认值为 100。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the name of the color selected in the color palette will be included in the link text. As a result, the rectangular selection will be highlighted with the specified color in the PDF viewer.
ast.target: 启用后，在调色板中选定的颜色名称将包含在链接文本中。因此，矩形选择将在 PDF 查看器中以指定颜色高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Not supported on smartphones) When enabled, the dropdown menus (⌄) in the PDF toolbar will be opened by hovering over the icon, and you don't need to click it.
ast.target: （不支持智能手机）启用后，PDF 工具栏中的下拉菜单（⌄）可通过将鼠标悬停在图标上打开，无需点击。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A input box will be added to the PDF toolbar, which indicated the current zoom level and allows you to set the zoom level by typing a number.
ast.target: PDF 工具栏将新增一个输入框，用于显示当前缩放级别，并允许你通过输入数字来设置缩放级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clicking a color while selecting a range of text will copy a link to the selection with "&color=..." appended.
ast.target: 在选择一段文本时点击颜色，会复制一个指向该选择的链接，并附加 "&color=..."。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A color palette will be added to the toolbar of the PDF viewer.
ast.target: PDF 查看器的工具栏将新增调色板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This color will be selected in the color palette in a newly opened PDF viewer.
ast.target: 在新打开的 PDF 查看器中，调色板将选中此颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify a different color for each color palette.
ast.target: 如果禁用，你可以为每个调色板指定不同的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Desktop & tablet only) Customize the behavior of the context menu that pops up when you right-click in the PDF viewer. For mobile users, see also the next section.
ast.target: （仅桌面与平板）自定义在 PDF 查看器中右键弹出的上下文菜单行为。移动端用户请参见下一节。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can customize the display text format in the setting "Copied text foramt > Display text format" below.
ast.target: 你可以在下方设置“Copied text foramt > Display text format”中自定义显示文本格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 仅在 macOS 上可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: "Search on Google Scholar": Available when right-clicking citation links in PDFs.
ast.target: “Search on Google Scholar”：在 PDF 中右键引用链接时可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Available when right-clicking with no text selected.
ast.target: 在未选中文本时右键可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to show the outline of a markdown file and a PDF file without key conflict.
ast.target: 开启后，你可以使用同一热键显示 markdown 文件和 PDF 文件的大纲，避免按键冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enabling this will allow you to use the same hotkey to close the sidebar if it is already open.
ast.target: 启用后，如果侧边栏已打开，你可以使用同一热键将其关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to zoom in/out a PDF viewer or any other type of view without key conflict.
ast.target: 开启后，你可以使用同一热键缩放 PDF 查看器或其他类型的视图，避免按键冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify a different display text format for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.
ast.target: 若禁用，你可以在 PDF 工具栏的下拉菜单中为每个 PDF 查看器指定不同的显示文本格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify a different action for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.
ast.target: 若禁用，你可以在 PDF 工具栏的下拉菜单中为每个 PDF 查看器指定不同的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For example, you can use this to copy a link to the page when there is no selection.
ast.target: 例如，在没有选中内容时，你可以用它复制页面链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Speed up the process of copying & pasting PDF links to your notes with some automation. Note that you can't activate both of auto-focus and auto-paste at the same time.
ast.target: 通过一些自动化加速将 PDF 链接复制并粘贴到笔记中的流程。注意，自动聚焦和自动粘贴不能同时启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the "Copy link to selection or annotation" command will be triggered automatically every time you select a range of text in a PDF viewer, meaning you don't even have to press a hotkey to copy a link.
ast.target: 启用后，每次在 PDF 查看器中选择一段文本时，都会自动触发“复制链接到选区或批注”命令，这意味着你无需按热键即可复制链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
ast.target: 如果启用下一项设置，你还可以通过左侧功能区菜单中的图标切换自动聚焦。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle this mode via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 你也可以通过命令切换此模式。更改该设置后请重新加载插件以生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, a markdown file will be focused automatically after copying a link to PDF text selection or annotation.
ast.target: 启用后，在复制 PDF 文本选区或批注的链接后，会自动聚焦到 markdown 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended if you prefer something less agressive than auto-paste. You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
ast.target: 如果你希望比自动粘贴更温和一些，推荐启用此项。若启用下一项设置，你还可以通过左侧功能区菜单中的图标切换自动聚焦。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-focus via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 你也可以通过命令切换自动聚焦。更改该设置后请重新加载插件以生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the copied link to PDF text selection or annotation will be automatically pasted into a markdown file right after copying.
ast.target: 启用后，复制 PDF 文本选区或批注的链接后会立即自动粘贴到 markdown 文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-paste via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
ast.target: 如果启用下一项设置，你还可以通过左侧功能区菜单中的图标切换自动粘贴。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also toggle auto-paste via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
ast.target: 你也可以通过命令切换自动粘贴。更改此设置后请重新加载插件以生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, auto-paste will focus on the editor after pasting.
ast.target: 启用后，自动粘贴会在粘贴后聚焦到编辑器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the text selection in the PDF viewer will be automatically cleared after performing auto-pasting.
ast.target: 启用后，在执行自动粘贴后将自动清除 PDF 查看器中的文本选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, triggering auto-pasting will paste the copied text at the current cursor position if the target note is already opened. If disabled, the text will be always appended to the end of the note.
ast.target: 启用后，若目标笔记已打开，触发自动粘贴会将复制的文本粘贴到当前光标位置。若禁用，文本将始终追加到笔记末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Because you disabled the option above, auto-pasted content will be added at the end of your note. Enable this option to make sure that you have a blank line between the existing content and the newly added content.
ast.target: 由于你禁用了上面的选项，自动粘贴的内容将添加到笔记末尾。启用此选项可确保现有内容与新添加内容之间有一个空行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: General settings that apply to both auto-focus and auto-paste.
ast.target: 同时适用于自动聚焦和自动粘贴的通用设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option will not affect the behavior of Hover Editor outside of PDF++.
ast.target: 此选项不会影响 PDF++ 之外的悬浮编辑器行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After auto-pasting into a markdown file opened in the left or right sidebar, the sidebar will be automatically collapsed once it loses focus.
ast.target: 在将内容自动粘贴到左侧或右侧边栏打开的 Markdown 文件后，边栏在失去焦点时会自动折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option can be useful especially when you set the previous option to "Hover Editor".
ast.target: 当你将上一项设置为“悬浮编辑器”时，此选项尤其有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When PDF++ cannot determine which markdown file to focus on or paste to, it will execute the command specified in the next option to let you pick a target file.
ast.target: 当 PDF++ 无法确定要聚焦或粘贴到哪个 Markdown 文件时，它将执行下一项中指定的命令以让你选择目标文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The link will be auto-pasted into the first markdown file that you open within this time frame after the command is executed. If you don't open any markdown file during this time, the auto-paste will not occur. This option is not related to auto-focus.
ast.target: 命令执行后，在该时间范围内你打开的第一个 Markdown 文件将自动粘贴该链接。如果在此期间未打开任何 Markdown 文件，则不会发生自动粘贴。此选项与自动聚焦无关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates a new note and opens it in a new pane specified in the "How to open target markdown file when not opened" option.
ast.target: 创建新笔记，并在“当目标 Markdown 文件未打开时如何打开”选项指定的新窗格中打开它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Note that turning on this option disables text selection in the annotation popup (e.g. modified date, author, etc).
ast.target: 请注意，开启此选项会禁用注释弹窗中的文本选择（例如修改日期、作者等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the same behavior as the PDF viewers of some web browsers (e.g. Chrome/Firefox). You may have to reopen the PDF file after changing this option.
ast.target: 该行为与部分网页浏览器（例如 Chrome/Firefox）的 PDF 查看器相同。更改此选项后可能需要重新打开 PDF 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can turn this on and off with the toggle button in the PDF viewer toolbar.
ast.target: 你可以使用 PDF 查看器工具栏中的切换按钮来开启或关闭它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, you can specify whether to write highlights to files for each PDF viewer.
ast.target: 如果禁用，你可以为每个 PDF 查看器指定是否将高亮写入文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, clicking the "navigate back" (left arrow) button will take you back to the page you were originally viewing before clicking on an internal link in the PDF file.
ast.target: 启用后，点击“navigate back”（左箭头）按钮会带你返回到在 PDF 文件中点击内部链接之前正在查看的页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Running this command while viewing a PDF file will copy a link, clicking which will open the PDF file at the current scroll position and zoom level.
ast.target: 在查看 PDF 文件时运行此命令会复制一个链接，点击该链接将以当前滚动位置和缩放级别打开该 PDF 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Requires custom context menu & PDF editing enabled) After copying a link by the above actions, you can "paste" it to a selection in PDF to create a PDF internal link. To do this, right-click the selection and click "Paste copied link to selection".
ast.target: （需要启用自定义上下文菜单和 PDF 编辑）通过上述操作复制链接后，你可以将其“粘贴”到 PDF 中的选区以创建 PDF 内部链接。为此，右键选区并点击“Paste copied link to selection”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify whether PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection" should be surrounded by borders.
ast.target: 指定通过“Paste copied link to selection”创建的 PDF 内部链接是否应有边框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the border color of PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection".
ast.target: 指定通过“Paste copied link to selection”创建的 PDF 内部链接的边框颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You don't need to care about this option in most use cases - just leave it to the default value. For advanced users: most internal links in PDF files use so-called destination names to specify the target location. This option allows you to specify the regular expressions (separated by line breaks) that determine whether a given internal link is a citation link based on the dsetination name.
ast.target: 在大多数情况下你无需关心此选项——保持默认值即可。面向高级用户：PDF 文件中的大多数内部链接使用所谓的目标名称来指定目标位置。此选项允许你指定正则表达式（用换行分隔），以基于 dsetination 名称判断给定内部链接是否为引用链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: General settings for the PDF sidebar. The options specific to the outline and thumbnails are located in the corresponding sections below.
ast.target: PDF 侧边栏的常规设置。与大纲和缩略图相关的选项位于下方对应部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires reopening the tabs after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后需要重新打开选项卡。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reopen PDFs after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后重新打开 PDF。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reopen tabs or reload the app after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后重新打开选项卡或重新加载应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can copy PDF outline as a markdown list or headings using the commands "Copy outline as markdown list" and "Copy outline as markdown headings".
ast.target: 你可以使用命令“Copy outline as markdown list”和“Copy outline as markdown headings”将 PDF 大纲复制为 markdown 列表或标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The copied headings will start at this level.
ast.target: 复制的标题将从此级别开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This enables you to copy a page link with a custom display text format specified in the PDF toolbar by right-clicking a thumbnail. Moreover, you will be able to insert, delete, extract pages if PDF modification is enabled.
ast.target: 这使你可以通过右键点击缩略图，以 PDF 工具栏中指定的自定义显示文本格式复制页面链接。此外，若启用 PDF 修改，你将能够插入、删除、提取页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the newly created PDF file will be opened after running the commands "Extract this page to a new file" or "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".
ast.target: 启用后，运行“Extract this page to a new file”或“Divide this PDF into two files at this page”命令后将打开新创建的 PDF 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to the commands "Insert page before/after this page".
ast.target: 适用于“在此页面前/后插入页面”命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to the command "Delete this page".
ast.target: 适用于“删除此页面”命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to the commands "Extract this page to a new file" and "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".
ast.target: 适用于“将此页面提取到新文件”和“在此页面将此 PDF 分成两个文件”命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the history is recorded only when you open a link to a different PDF file. If enabled, the history will be recorded even when you open a link to the same PDF file as the current one, and you will be able to go back and forth the history by clicking the left/right arrow buttons even within a single PDF file.
ast.target: 默认情况下，仅在你打开指向其他 PDF 文件的链接时才会记录历史。启用后，即使打开指向与当前相同 PDF 文件的链接也会记录历史，并且即使在同一个 PDF 文件内，你也可以通过点击左右箭头按钮前后浏览历史。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 当你在与 PDF 查看器同一分栏的标签页中打开 PDF 链接时，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After changing this option, you need to reopen tabs or reload the app.
ast.target: 更改此选项后，你需要重新打开标签页或重载应用。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 你可以通过反向链接窗格右上角的“仅显示当前页面中的反向链接”按钮切换开关。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 如果关闭，按页筛选反向链接时将只显示指向特定文本选区、注释或位置的反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 要添加新颜色，请点击上方“高亮颜色”设置中的“+”按钮。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 使用操作系统定义的 PDF 默认应用打开 PDF 链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the same PDF file both in the default app and Obsidian at the same time.
ast.target: 在默认应用和 Obsidian 中同时打开同一个 PDF 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you focus on a PDF file in Obsidian, the external app will also focus on the same file.
ast.target: 当你在 Obsidian 中聚焦某个 PDF 文件时，外部应用也会聚焦到同一文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Otherwise, the focus will be moved to the external app.
ast.target: 否则，焦点将移至外部应用。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 将新创建的虚拟 PDF 文件放在此文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If your file is under "vault/folder", and you set subfolder name to "attachments", dummy PDF files will be saved to "vault/folder/attachments".
ast.target: 如果你的文件位于“vault/folder”，并将子文件夹名称设置为“attachments”，则虚拟 PDF 文件将保存到“vault/folder/attachments”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reopen the PDF viewers after changing this option.
ast.target: 更改此选项后重新打开 PDF 查看器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: They are used preferentially from left to right, so you might want to put the easier-to-reach keys first. This is the same as Tridactyl's "hintchars" option.
ast.target: 它们会从左到右优先使用，因此你可能想把更容易按到的按键放在前面。这与 Tridactyl 的 "hintchars" 选项相同。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 用空格分隔的 "link"/"annot"/"backlink" 或 "all" 列表。运行 ":help :hint" 查看详情。

ast.target: 按住 jkhl 键时的滚动速度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all matches will be highlighted.
ast.target: 启用后，将高亮显示所有匹配项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, PDF++ will automatically check for updates every 24 hours and notify you if a new version is available.
ast.target: 启用后，PDF++ 将每 24 小时自动检查更新，并在有新版本时通知你。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For example, when you copy a link to a text selection in a PDF file, the status "Link copied" will be displayed in the PDF toolbar.
ast.target: 例如，当你复制 PDF 文件中的文本选择链接时，PDF 工具栏会显示状态“链接已复制”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The "Create new PDF" command will create a new PDF file in the location specified here.
ast.target: “创建新 PDF”命令将在此处指定的位置创建新的 PDF 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Newly created PDFs will appear under this folder.
ast.target: 新创建的 PDF 将显示在此文件夹下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Provide the "PATH" environment variable for PDF++ to run shell commands without the full paths specified. In MacOS and Linux, you can run "echo $PATH" in Terminal and then copy & paste the result here. Currently, it will be used only when you run ":!<command>" in Vim mode.
ast.target: 提供 "PATH" 环境变量以便 PDF++ 在运行 shell 命令时无需指定完整路径。在 MacOS 和 Linux 中，你可以在终端运行 "echo $PATH"，然后将结果复制并粘贴到这里。目前仅在 Vim 模式下运行 ":!<command>" 时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can find more options in Style Settings > PDF++.
ast.target: 你可以在 样式设置 > PDF++ 中找到更多选项。

ast.source: :obcommand <command-id> - Execute the Obsidian command with the specified ID. Inspired by esm's awesome Vimrc Support plugin.
ast.target: :obcommand <command-id> - 执行具有指定 ID 的 Obsidian 命令。灵感来自 esm 的出色 Vimrc Support 插件。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
:hint [<target1> <target2> ...] - Enter hint mode and show hint marks for the specified targets in the current page. Inspired by [Tridactyl](https://github.com/tridactyl/tridactyl)'s hint mode.
            
            If no target is specified, the default targets (configured in PDF++ settings) will be used.
            The accepted targets are: 
            
            - \`all\`: all of the followings
            - \`link\`: internal & external links
            - \`annot\`: (non-link) annotations written in the file
            - \`backlink\`: backlink highlighting, i.e., highlights that is not written in the file itself
ast.target:
:hint [<target1> <target2> ...] - 进入提示模式并在当前页面为指定目标显示提示标记。灵感来自 [Tridactyl](https://github.com/tridactyl/tridactyl) 的提示模式。
            
            如果未指定目标，将使用默认目标（在 PDF++ 设置中配置）。
            可接受的目标有：
            
            - \`all\`：以下所有目标
            - \`link\`：内部和外部链接
            - \`annot\`：文件中写入的（非链接）注释
            - \`backlink\`：反向链接高亮，即文件本身未写入的高亮
